name: @liangrk/claude-code-wechatbot
description: Claude Code Channel plugin for WeChat — bridge WeChat messages into Claude Code sessions via the official ilink API

scripts.build: esbuild wechat-channel.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --outfile=dist/wechat-channel.js && esbuild setup.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --outfile=dist/setup.js && esbuild wechat-bot.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --outfile=dist/wechat-bot.js
